# Refund Processing Time

At Acme Shop, the refund process after receiving a returned item typically takes 5 to 7 business days, allowing time for inspection to ensure the item meets return eligibility requirements. Refunds are credited to the original payment method, with additional time for processing depending on the bank or payment platform used. During peak seasons, processing times may be longer, and special cases may require further review, potentially delaying refunds. Customer support is available for any inquiries related to the refund process.

[Source: returns_policy.md#refund-processing-time]
